text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Awww, turned down again. What's<n>everybody so
shy for?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How'd you like to go on a date with<n>little ol' me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We'll go for a drive along the beach! I'll<n>be sure to
leave your heart pounding. ☆
